name: zdoc
description: CLI tool for semantic document indexing and search using vector embeddings

scripts.test:docker: docker build --platform linux/amd64 --target dev -t zdoc-dev . && docker run --platform linux/amd64 --rm zdoc-dev npx vitest run
scripts.test:cli: docker build --platform linux/amd64 --target prod -t zdoc-test . && docker run --platform linux/amd64 --rm -v $(pwd)/tests/cli-test.sh:/tmp/cli-test.sh --entrypoint /bin/bash zdoc-test /tmp/cli-test.sh
